collection_schedule.title: Your collection schedule
collection_schedule.description: Select the day your bins are collected and which calendar variant applies to your street. If you're unsure, check the South & Vale website — they list which variant (V1 or V2) applies to each area.

init.title: Display options
init.description: Customise how waste collection information is displayed in Home Assistant.

data.type_aliases_raw: Waste type aliases (one per line: Original = Your label)
